originalTitle: Live RL dev on Pufferlib w/ Joseph Suarez
title: Debugging Double-Buffered Vec Backend and Profiling TinyGrad Kernels
summary: Debugged a double-buffered multithreaded vectorization backend for Pufferlib, achieving 30 million SPS but identifying a bug with two buffers. Later profiled TinyGrad's RMS norm kernel, finding it 3x faster than PyTorch eager mode for small models, and planned further comparison for fused scan.
